productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Blue Shirts
description: Composition Blue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, with full cuff sleeves, tipped collar with full front cloth button placket, pocket on left chest with a cloth button closure and has a curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Perfect for those casual days, this checked shirt from united colors of benetton is made of pure cotton fabric to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and stilletos for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
